promotions.fact: Auditor is RSM US LLP (Minneapolis, MN)
State addenda cover 11 states: Michigan, California, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Wisconsin
Noncompete unenforceable in California and North Dakota
Interest rate capped at 10% in California (vs. 14% in FA)
Unlimited personal guaranty from all equity holders
No liquidated damages formula found in franchise agreement
No force majeure provision found in franchise agreement
Salon development sales act as agent ($16.27M gross, recorded net)
Ad Fund sponsorship commitments: $14.8M-$15.1M/year (NHL, NCAA, ESPN)
S corp to C corp conversion January 1, 2019
